USAF Hangar Fighter

Canvas-based MVP fighter with two playable airwomen, one hangar stage, local multiplayer, and optional CPU control.

Shape-driven animation keeps the matchup readable and responsive while staying easy to run in any desktop browser.

Rotate Phone

This fighter is tuned for landscape. Turn your phone sideways, then tap the game to start.

Player 1

CWU 27/P

A / D move

W jump

S crouch

F punch

G kick

Player 2

2PFDU

Left / Right move

Up jump

Down crouch

K punch

L kick

System

C toggle CPU for Player 2

H toggle hitbox debug

Space pause

Enter reset round

Open this file directly in Chrome, Edge, or Firefox to play.
